description: Extracts the quadratic equation coefficients (a, b, c) from the user prompt and generates the function call JSON with the solve_quadratic_equation function name and parameters

inputs.name: user_input
inputs.description: The complete user prompt containing the quadratic equation parameters that need to be extracted and processed into a function call

inputs.name: available_functions
inputs.description: The function definitions available for generating the appropriate function call structure

output.description: Returns a function call object with the function name as the key and parameters as values: {"solve_quadratic_equation": {"a": 2, "b": 6, "c": 5}} where the coefficients are extracted from the user input using deterministic parsing to find numeric values for a, b, and c parameters

fields.solve_quadratic_equation: dict containing the extracted coefficient parameters a, b, and c as integers

workflow_spec.name: Generate Function Call for Quadratic Equation
workflow_spec.description: Parses user query to extract quadratic equation coefficients and generates the appropriate function call JSON with exact parameter values
